issues.description: Counter cards must use trigger:'Counter', not 'OnAttacked'. This is a Counter effect.
First action should be optional trash from hand (conditional), not mandatory TrashFromHand. The 'You may' indicates this is optional.
TrashFromHand with count:2 from deck is incorrect. Should use a separate action targeting deck, not hand. The second trash is 'from the top of your deck', not hand.
Second effect with trigger:'Trigger' and ReturnToHand action is completely unrelated to card text. This effect should not exist.
PowerBoost target should specify 'maxCount':1 to match 'Up to 1 of your Leader'.
The trash from hand action must be conditional/optional (You may trash). Structure should reflect optional first action, then conditional subsequent actions.
